source_meaning: synonym of اِنْقَلَبَ عَلَى عَقِبَيْهِ (inqalaba ʕalā ʕaqibayhi)
target_meaning: turn the tables (literally: turn the pike)
A reply to an unfunny remark.

target_idiom: zu gut, um wahr zu sein

source_meaning: a choice between two unpleasant alternatives; between a rock and a hard place, between the hammer and the anvil, between the devil and the deep blue sea
target_meaning: to be between Scylla and Charybdis
